name: Musicmenia
short_description: Musicmenia is a strategic and musical card game. Face off online against other players, build your deck, and adapt your strategy to win. Adjust the tempo and lead your concert to victory!
detailed_description:
Musicmenia is an exciting collectible and strategic card game that fuses the passion for classical music with intense musical duels. Build and customize your deck with cards of legendary composers like Mozart, Beethoven, Tchaikovsky, and Ravel, as well as iconic musical pieces like "The Four Seasons" and "1812 Overture". Each card brings unique abilities and strategies, allowing you to adapt the rhythm and tempo of the game to your favor.

Online Duels

Take your skills to the next level in online player-versus-player matches. Compete against players from around the world to become the ultimate concert master. Thanks to the dynamic game system and the wide variety of cards, each match is a unique and exciting experience.

Single-Player Campaign Mode

Embark on a fascinating single-player campaign that will take you through the history of classical music. Explore different musical periods such as the Renaissance, Baroque, Classicism, Romanticism, and Modernism. Face challenging opponents and discover the rich musical heritage that inspires each card.

Delve into the world of Musicmenia and prove that you are the best concert master in exciting musical duels!

supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain*, French, Italian, German, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal
*languages with full audio support
